name: ISCC PLUS 2024 v1
description: ISCC PLUS covers non-food/feed biomass and circular materials.

requirements.name: GHG Emission Calculation (Broader Scope)
requirements.description: Calculate and report total GHG emissions for the reporting period using the ISCC methodology.
requirements.guidanceText: Use the ISCC GHG calculation tool. Report in tCO2e. Include Scope 1 direct emissions from processing. GHG methodology applies to a wider scope of biomass.

requirements.name: Protection of Land with High Biodiversity Value
requirements.description: Land criteria include additional biomass types.
requirements.guidanceText: Check for primary forests, highly biodiverse forests, etc.
